reviews.comment:
Mucha demora en un dia no tan concurrido, los playeros se toman su tiempo, no se que hacen que tardan tanto en cargarte, van a la oficina, salen! se ponen a charlar entre ellos,  puede ser la forma de ser pero no vuelvo mas, en la siguiente estacion son mucho mas agiles

(Translated by Google)
Very long delays on a day that wasn't very busy. The attendants take their time; I don't know what they're doing that makes it take so long to load you. They go to the office, come out, and start chatting amongst themselves. Maybe that's just how they are, but I won't be back. They're much faster at the next station.
